A

AbstractHandler - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server
Base implementation of the Handler interface and extends UnicastRemoteObject.
AbstractHandler(int, Server) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.AbstractHandler
Constructs an AbstractHandler with a client ID and a reference to the server.
addCard(Card) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Adds a card to the deck.
addChat(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIView
Adds a new chat tab for the specified nickname if it doesn't already exist.
addHandler(Integer, Handler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.Server
Adds a client handler to the handlers map.
addMessageToChat(ChatMessage) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.ChooseColorController
Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.

Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.

Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.

Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.
addMessageToChat(ChatMessage) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.WaitingController
Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.
addMessageToGlobalChat(ChatMessage) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Controller.GameController
This method sends the global message passed as a parameter to all players in the game.
addMessageToGlobalChat(ChatMessage) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.VirtualView

addNickname(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.WaitingController
Appends a new player's nickname to the TextArea for displaying join messages.
addPlayer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Game
Adds a new player to the game.
addPlayer(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.GameServerInstance
Adds a Player and its associated client ID to the internal mapping.
addPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.VirtualView
 
addToHand(PlayableCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Adds the specified card to the player's hand and notifies all clients.
addToHand(ArrayList<PlayableCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Adds the specified list of cards to the player's hand and notifies all clients.
addToHandObjective(ArrayList<ObjectiveCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Adds the specified list of objective cards to the player's hand and notifies all clients.
addToQueue(Message) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.GameServerInstance
Adds a message to the queue.
addToQueue(Message) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.Server
Adds a message to the server's message queue for processing.
addUnistancedHandler(int, AbstractHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.Server
Adds an AbstractHandler instance to the unistancedHandlers map.
